zh.Elderslie, Renfrew, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾爾德斯利
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay於1310年出生在英國蘇格蘭。她與Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1372年在蘇格蘭享年62歲。

zh-hans.Elderslie, Renfrew, Scotland: 英国苏格兰雷福福爾艾爾德斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay于1310年出生在英国苏格兰。她与Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1372年在苏格兰享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay was born in 1310, in Scotland, United Kingdom. She married Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1372, in Scotland, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay est née en 1310, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1372, à Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay wurde 1310 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1372 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay è nata il nel 1310 nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1372, nel Scotland, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.Elderslie, Renfrew, Scotland: イギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルダースリー
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsayは1310年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた。Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1372年にスコットランドで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay(은)는 1310년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 스컷랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Elderslie, Renfrew, Scotland: Elderslie, Siorrachd Rinn Friù, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay nasceu em 1310, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1372, em Scotland, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay родилась в 1310 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1372 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret de Lindsay nació en 1310, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Se casó con Lord Adam Wallace - Laird of Elderslie and Auchinbothie. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1372, en Scotland, a la edad de 62 años.
